name: Dundee Game Jam
description: A weekend-long game jam hosted in Dundee, open to developers, artists, designers, and musicians of all experience levels. Participants form teams on-site and have 48 hours to create a playable game from scratch based on a surprise theme revealed at the start. Prizes are awarded across categories including Best Game, Best Art, and Best Use of Theme. Held at Abertay University's campus, the event brings together students and professionals from across Tayside and beyond.
short_description: A 48-hour game jam in Dundee open to developers, artists, and designers of all levels.
